message:
test(ufunc): add end-to-end workflow oracle tests for z-score, sort-cumsum, and boolean filter

Add 3 workflow tests chaining multiple operations:
- workflow_zscore_normalization: mean + std + broadcast + sub + div
- workflow_sort_cumsum_percentile: sort + cumsum + percentile
- workflow_boolean_filter_mean: comparison mask + filter + mean
All verified against NumPy expected values within 1e-12 tolerance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
